seo.title: E-Commerce implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping E-Commerce projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist outlines the technical requirements for deploying a high-performance headless e-commerce storefront. It focuses on performance, payment reliability, and SEO integrity using modern stacks like Next.js, Medusa, and Stripe.

items.title: Image Optimization and Delivery
items.description: Verify all product images are served via a CDN like Cloudinary or Vercel Image Optimization in WebP/AVIF formats with correct 'sizes' attributes.

items.title: LCP Element Prioritization
items.description: Ensure the primary product image on PDPs (Product Detail Pages) uses the 'priority' attribute and is not lazy-loaded.

items.title: Edge Data Fetching
items.description: Implement stale-while-revalidate or Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR) for product listings to keep TTFB under 200ms.

items.title: Font Loading Strategy
items.description: Apply 'font-display: swap' and pre-connect to font origins to prevent layout shifts during text rendering.

items.title: Bundle Size Analysis
items.description: Run a production build analysis to ensure third-party scripts (chat widgets, tracking) do not exceed 50KB of main-thread execution time.

items.title: Webhook Reliability
items.description: Implement idempotent webhook handlers for Stripe or Adyen to prevent duplicate order creation on network retries.

items.title: Tax Calculation Accuracy
items.description: Verify that tax calculation services (Stripe Tax or Avalara) trigger correctly based on the shipping address before the final payment intent.

items.title: Atomic Inventory Updates
items.description: Ensure inventory is reserved or deducted atomically during the checkout flow to prevent overselling during high-traffic events.

items.title: Currency and Locale Sync
items.description: Validate that the price displayed in the cart matches the currency and amount sent to the payment provider across all regions.

items.title: Guest Checkout Flow
items.description: Test the end-to-end flow for non-authenticated users to ensure session persistence from cart to 'thank you' page.

items.title: Search Index Synchronization
items.description: Configure automated triggers to update Algolia or Meilisearch indexes immediately when product status or stock changes in the CMS.

items.title: Facet Filtering Performance
items.description: Verify that category filters (size, color, price) update the product grid without a full page reload and maintain URL state.

items.title: Zero-Results Handling
items.description: Implement a 'No results found' state that provides alternative product recommendations to reduce bounce rates.

items.title: AI Description Uniqueness
items.description: Audit AI-generated product descriptions for duplicate content patterns to avoid SEO cannibalization across similar SKUs.

items.title: Variant Selection Logic
items.description: Ensure that selecting a variant (e.g., XL size) updates the SKU, price, and image gallery immediately.

items.title: JSON-LD Product Schema
items.description: Inject valid Schema.org markup including price, availability, aggregateRating, and brand on all PDPs.

items.title: Canonical Tag Implementation
items.description: Verify that variant URLs or filtered category pages point to the primary canonical URL to prevent duplicate content issues.

items.title: Dynamic Sitemap Generation
items.description: Configure a dynamic sitemap.xml that includes all active product, category, and CMS pages, updated at least daily.

items.title: Robots.txt Configuration
items.description: Disallow crawling of sensitive or low-value routes like /cart, /checkout, and /account/ search result pages.

items.title: OpenGraph Image Automation
items.description: Generate dynamic social sharing images for products that include the product name, price, and primary image.

items.title: PCI Compliance Verification
items.description: Confirm that no raw credit card data touches your server and that all inputs use hosted fields or elements from the payment provider.

items.title: API Key Scoping
items.description: Ensure public API keys (Algolia, Stripe Publishable) are restricted by domain and have minimal required permissions.

items.title: Rate Limiting
items.description: Implement rate limiting on the 'Add to Cart', 'Login', and 'Checkout' endpoints to prevent bot-driven inventory locking.

items.title: Sanitized User Inputs
items.description: Validate and sanitize all review submissions and contact forms to prevent XSS and injection attacks.

items.title: GDPR/CCPA Cookie Consent
items.description: Implement a consent management platform that blocks tracking scripts until the user provides explicit permission.

items.title: Failed Payment Logging
items.description: Set up alerts in Sentry or Datadog for payment intent failures to identify issues with specific regions or card types.

items.title: 404 Redirection Logic
items.description: Implement automatic redirects for discontinued product URLs to the most relevant parent category.

items.title: Cart Recovery Triggers
items.description: Verify that abandoned cart events are correctly sent to the marketing automation platform (Klaviyo/Mailchimp) after 30 minutes of inactivity.

items.title: Real User Monitoring (RUM)
items.description: Deploy RUM tracking to capture actual Core Web Vitals from users across different device types and network speeds.

items.title: Inventory Out-of-Stock UI
items.description: Ensure the 'Add to Cart' button is disabled and replaced with a 'Notify Me' or 'Out of Stock' label when inventory reaches zero.
